---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <h1>Simen Bjerkelund</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Financial Analyst · Quantitative Researcher · Data Scientist</p>
  <div class="hero-badges">
    <span class="badge">Algorithmic Trading</span>
    <span class="badge">Machine Learning</span>
    <span class="badge">Norwegian Markets</span>
    <span class="badge">Risk Analytics</span>
    <span class="badge">R · Python · Shiny</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About Me

I am a financial analyst and quantitative researcher with a background spanning public sector finance management (Bærum Municipality, NOK 2.2bn budget), two master's degrees in applied finance and intelligence systems, and independent algorithmic trading development.

I build analytics tools primarily in R and Shiny, covering trade performance attribution, ML-driven opportunity scanning, Monte Carlo risk simulation, and automated economic analysis of Norwegian SSB data. I also work with Python and SQL where needed, and I continuously explore how new AI tools can augment data analysis workflows.

The purpose of this site is to explore, learn, and publish my data projects. Publishing them gives the work some skin in the game and helps raise both the quality and volume of output. The projects are driven by my own interests, but also follow news and trending topics.

```{=html}
<div class="red-banner">
  <svg class="red-banner-svg" viewBox="0 0 680 160" preserveAspectRatio="none">
    <!-- Grid lines -->
    <line x1="30" y1="140" x2="660" y2="140" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <line x1="30" y1="100" x2="660" y2="100" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <line x1="30" y1="60" x2="660" y2="60" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <line x1="30" y1="20" x2="660" y2="20" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <!-- Abstract bar chart -->
    <rect x="40"  y="90"  width="14" height="50"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="80"  y="60"  width="14" height="80"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="120" y="75"  width="14" height="65"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="160" y="40"  width="14" height="100" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"/>
    <rect x="200" y="55"  width="14" height="85"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="240" y="70"  width="14" height="70"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="280" y="30"  width="14" height="110" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"/>
    <rect x="320" y="50"  width="14" height="90"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="360" y="65"  width="14" height="75"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="400" y="25"  width="14" height="115" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.09)"/>
    <rect x="440" y="45"  width="14" height="95"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="480" y="55"  width="14" height="85"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="520" y="35"  width="14" height="105" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.07)"/>
    <rect x="560" y="50"  width="14" height="90"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <rect x="600" y="20"  width="14" height="120" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.09)"/>
    <rect x="640" y="60"  width="14" height="80"  rx="2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
    <!-- Trend line -->
    <polyline
      points="47,85 87,55 127,68 167,35 207,48 247,62 287,24 327,42 367,58 407,18 447,38 487,48 527,28 567,42 607,14 647,52"
      fill="none"
      stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"
      stroke-width="1.5"
      stroke-linecap="round"
      stroke-linejoin="round"
    />
    <!-- Peak dots -->
    <circle cx="167" cy="35" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
    <circle cx="287" cy="24" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
    <circle cx="407" cy="18" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
    <circle cx="607" cy="14" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
  </svg>
</div>
```

## Featured Projects

```{=html}
<div class="card-grid">
  <a class="project-card" href="projects/trading-analytics.html">
    
    <h3>Trading Analytics Platform</h3>
    <p>Comprehensive R Shiny app for trade performance analysis, ML-driven strategy development, and risk optimization. Processes data from Nordnet broker.</p>
    <div class="tech-tags">
      <span class="tag">R Shiny</span>
      <span class="tag">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="tag">Random Forest</span>
      <span class="tag">Monte Carlo</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="project-card" href="ssb-daily/index.html">
    
    <h3>SSB Daily Dashboard</h3>
    <p>Automated daily analysis of Statistics Norway (SSB) data — economic indicators, market trends, and macro signals — refreshed every morning via GitHub Actions.</p>
    <div class="tech-tags">
      <span class="tag">PxWebApiData</span>
      <span class="tag">GitHub Actions</span>
      <span class="tag">Quarto</span>
      <span class="tag">SSB API</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="project-card" href="projects/opportunity-scanner.html">
    
    <h3>Opportunity Scanner</h3>
    <p>ML-powered scanner across major stock indices using adaptive filter indicators, temporal cross-validation, and ensemble predictions.</p>
    <div class="tech-tags">
      <span class="tag">Logistic Regression</span>
      <span class="tag">Technical Indicators</span>
      <span class="tag">Yahoo Finance</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```

## Latest from the Blog

*→ See all posts on the [Blog](blog/index.qmd)*

---

*Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) · Hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com) · Updated daily*
